elements.title: lang::report_page_058_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT ue.userid,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.phone1,
       kbi_u.phone2,
       kbi_u.institution,
       kbi_u.department,
       kbi_u.address,
       kbi_u.city,
       kbi_u.country,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_g.timemodified                        as graduated,
       kbi_cm.added                              as created,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)   AS grade,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g_c.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g_c.finalgrade / kbi_g_c.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g_c.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade_course,
       kbi_gi.gradepass,
       kbi_g.rawgrademax,
       kbi_g.finalgrade,
       kbi_cm.completion,
       kbi_cmc.completionstate,
       kbi_m.name                                AS module_name,
       ta.tags,
       ue.enrol_status,
       ue.timeend
FROM (SELECT MIN(kbi_ue1.id) AS id, kbi_ue1.userid, kbi_e1.courseid, MIN(kbi_ue1.status) AS enrol_status, MIN(kbi_ue1.timeend) AS timeend
      FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue1
             JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e1 ON kbi_e1.id = kbi_ue1.enrolid
      GROUP BY kbi_ue1.userid, kbi_e1.courseid) ue
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = ue.courseid
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cm.instance > 0
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi
         ON kbi_gi.itemtype = 'mod' AND kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_gi.itemmodule = kbi_m.name AND kbi_gi.gradetype = 1
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_qa.quiz,
                         kbi_qa.userid,
                         MAX(kbi_qa.attempt)      AS num_of_attempts,
                         MIN(kbi_qa.timemodified) AS first_completed_date
                  FROM mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa
                         JOIN mdl_quiz kbi_q ON kbi_q.id = kbi_qa.quiz AND kbi_q.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_qa.quiz, kbi_qa.userid) qat ON qat.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_m.name = 'quiz' AND qat.quiz = kbi_cm.instance
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_asbm1.assignment,
                         kbi_asbm1.userid,
                         COUNT(*)                AS num_of_attempts,
                         MIN(kbi_asbm1.timemodified) AS first_completed_date
                  FROM mdl_assign_submission kbi_asbm1
                         JOIN mdl_assign kbi_a ON kbi_a.id = kbi_asbm1.assignment AND kbi_a.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_asbm1.assignment, kbi_asbm1.userid) asbm
         ON asbm.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_m.name = 'assign' AND asbm.assignment = kbi_cm.instance
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_i.itemid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT kbi_t.rawname) AS tags
                  FROM mdl_tag_instance kbi_i, mdl_tag kbi_t
                  WHERE kbi_t.id = kbi_i.tagid
                    AND kbi_i.itemtype = 'course_modules'
                  GROUP BY kbi_i.itemid) ta ON ta.itemid = kbi_cm.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi_c ON kbi_gi_c.itemtype = 'course' AND kbi_gi_c.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g_c ON kbi_g_c.itemid = kbi_gi_c.id AND kbi_g_c.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_cm.course = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
